## 10. Milestone Roadmap

| M | Goal | Key deliverables | Acceptance check |
|---|---|---|---|
| **M0** | Scaffold + Supabase local + tenant routing | Nuxt 4 + layers; `@nuxtjs/supabase`; Tailwind v4 `main.css`; `0000_init.sql` applied locally; `00.tenant.ts` (H1); `reserved.ts`; `lvh.me` dev | `lvh.me:3000`/`app.lvh.me:3000`/`<x>.lvh.me:3000` resolve correct surface; spoofed `X-Forwarded-Host` does NOT change tenant (H1 test green) |
| **M1** | Auth + admin shell | Supabase Auth on `app.*` (host-scoped cookie, H8); Custom Access Token Hook sets `app_metadata.global_role` (H9); admin layout + auth middleware; store creation (service-role, reserved check) | Seller signs up, creates a store, lands on dashboard; superadmin claim present in JWT; customer JWT cannot write `store_members` (H10) |
| **M2** | Manual products + storefront browse | Admin product CRUD (RLS); storefront product list/detail via anon+RLS (H2); SSR theme fallback applied | Published product visible on `<store>.*`; draft invisible to anon; cross-tenant read returns 0 rows |
| **M3** | Cart + manual checkout + order mgmt | Pinia cart (`insteshop:cart:<subdomain>`); `/cart/price`; `place_order` RPC (H3/M3); `order_lookup` (M4); admin orders + state machine; Resend new-order email | Guest places COD order; tampered `total`/`store_id` ignored (server reprices); admin transitions follow allowed map; guest reads own order by token only |
| **M4** | IG connect + import | IG Login OAuth (H4 state); Vault token (M1); `/sync` re-host (H7); draft-product mapping; deauth/data-deletion (H5); refresh cron | Test-account seller connects, imports posts as drafts with re-hosted images; forged `signed_request` rejected; token never in logs (M2) |
| **M5** | Theming pipeline | Read IG re-hosted images; Claude generate (verified params); validate→clamp→contrast→fallback (H6); SSR `--t-*` no-FOUC; regenerate/revert; rate limit (L6) | Generated theme applies on first paint (no flash); out-of-enum/CSS-breakout inputs → fallback (tests green); contrast AA enforced |
| **M6** | Stripe | `checkout` Stripe branch; `webhooks/stripe` (raw body, L4); `mark_order_paid_stripe`; abandoned-session sweep | Test-mode card → order auto-`paid`, converges to identical state as COD; webhook idempotent; bad signature rejected |
| **M7** | Deploy / wildcard | Vercel Pro + wildcard `*.insteshop.app` (Node functions); DNS at Vercel; Vercel Cron → `/api/ig/_cron/refresh`; CSP + security headers; prod env | Real subdomains serve correct store over TLS; cron refreshes tokens; client bundle has no secrets (M8 grep) |

---

## 11. Scaffold Step List (M0 — start immediately)

1. **Prereqs:** `brew install node supabase/tap/supabase`; `corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate`; start Docker Desktop.
2. **Init:** `pnpm dlx nuxi@latest init insteshop` (pnpm) → `cd insteshop`.
3. **Deps:** `pnpm add @nuxtjs/supabase @pinia/nuxt pinia @vueuse/core @anthropic-ai/sdk zod sharp stripe resend tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite`; `pnpm add -D @nuxt/eslint eslint typescript vue-tsc supabase`.
4. **Supabase local:** `pnpm supabase init`; create `supabase/migrations/0000_init.sql` (paste §3 in order: extensions→enums→tables→helpers→RLS→RPCs); `pnpm supabase start`; `pnpm supabase db reset`.
5. **Types:** `pnpm supabase gen types typescript --local > shared/types/database.types.ts`.
6. **Tailwind:** create `app/assets/css/main.css` (§6 `@theme` → `--t-*`).
7. **Shared:** `shared/tenancy/reserved.ts` (export `RESERVED_SUBDOMAINS` Set + `SUBDOMAIN_RE` + `isClaimableSubdomain`); `shared/types/{theme.ts,orders.ts,tenant.ts}`.
8. **Tenant core:** `server/utils/tenant.ts` (`parseHost` with `xForwardedHost:false`, `lookupStoreBySubdomain`); `server/middleware/00.tenant.ts` (sets `store`/`surface`/`hostInfo`); `server/utils/supabaseAdmin.ts` + `server/utils/tenantDb.ts` (`tenantScoped`).
9. **Theme SSR:** `server/utils/theme/toCssVars.ts` + `server/plugins/inject-theme.ts` (emit fallback when no theme).
10. **Layers:** create `layers/{base,marketing,admin,storefront}/` each with `nuxt.config.ts` + `app/`; base `composables/useTenant.ts`; storefront `pages/index.vue`; admin `pages/index.vue` + `middleware/auth.ts`; marketing `pages/index.vue`.
11. **Config:** write `nuxt.config.ts` (§8); copy `.env.example`→`.env` with `supabase status` values; set `NUXT_PUBLIC_APP_BASE_DOMAIN=lvh.me:3000`.
12. **Log redaction stub:** `server/plugins/log-redaction.ts` (M2) — scaffold now even if empty.
13. **Run + verify:** `pnpm dev:host`; open `lvh.me:3000` (marketing), `app.lvh.me:3000` (admin shell), `<x>.lvh.me:3000` (404 store-not-found until a store exists). Add the **H1 spoof test** to CI immediately.
14. **Seed:** `supabase/seed.sql` — 1 superadmin, 1 seller, 1 active store (`acme`), a couple published products + a fallback theme row; re-run via `pnpm db:reset`.

---

## 12. Open Questions / Decisions Still Needed From Product Owner

| ID | Decision | Recommendation | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|---|
| **D-J1** | Instagram Login vs Facebook Login as primary IG connector | **Instagram Login** (no FB Page needed, fewer scopes, single host) — schema supports both | Diverges from literal "Facebook Login" in locked decisions; needs ratification. Changes only the login button + scopes, not the data model |
| **D-DEPLOY** | Hosting | **Vercel Pro + Node-runtime functions** | Reconciles wildcard TLS need with Node-only Anthropic SDK + service-role; resolves cron host |
| **D-CRON** | Token-refresh + abandoned-session scheduler | **Vercel Cron → secret-protected `/api/ig/_cron/refresh`** (follows D-DEPLOY) | IG 60-day tokens die on dormant sellers without it |
| **D2** | Confirm Supabase **Vault** works in local CLI stack | Verify early; if absent, dev-only env-encrypted fallback **behind a flag that does not fork the prod schema** | Token-at-rest design depends on it |
| **D-AUTH-HOOK** | Owner of the Custom Access Token Hook (sets `app_metadata.global_role`) | nuxt-structure/auth subsystem owns it | Until wired, superadmin checks silently fail (H9/M) |
| **D-CUST-AUTH** | Separate customer auth pool from seller auth? | **Yes** — store-scoped customer sessions, distinct from seller sessions on `app.*` (ties to H8/H10) | A shared `auth.users` pool means a registered customer is one `store_members` insert from staff |
| **D-INV** | Per-store inventory tracking default | `stores.track_inventory` default **false** | Affects whether `place_order` blocks on stock |
| **D-SHIP-TAX** | v1 shipping/tax computation | v1 = `total = subtotal`; add `computeShipping`/tax in v1.1 | `orders` already has `shipping_minor`/`tax_minor` columns |
| **D-CUR** | Enforce `products.currency = stores.base_currency` via trigger? | Recommend yes (single currency per store v1) | Prevents mixed-currency carts |
| **D-DEDUPE** | Dedupe guest customers by phone as well as email? | Open | `customers (store_id,email)` unique ignores NULL email |

— End of blueprint —
